description_long: This object is a modern double-action revolver with a robust, angular frame and a matte black finish. The barrel is medium-length and features prominent venting or porting along the top, as well as a rail for mounting accessories. The cylinder is metallic silver, contrasting with the rest of the body, and is designed to hold six rounds. The grip is ergonomically contoured, finished in a glossy black with a hint of red at the rear, and appears to be made of a synthetic or composite material for improved handling. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement, while the hammer and trigger are both metallic and well-defined. The overall design is tactical and modern, suitable for law enforcement or civilian use in urban environments.
description: A modern, tactical revolver with a vented barrel, silver cylinder, and ergonomic black grip with red accents. The design is robust and angular, featuring a rail and prominent trigger guard.
description_view_0: The front view shows the circular barrel opening, vented barrel top, and the front sight post, emphasizing the weapon's width and muzzle.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the vented barrel, silver cylinder, contoured black grip with red accent, and the rail on top.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the grip, the hammer, and the alignment of the barrel and sights, with the red accent on the grip most visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the barrel vents, silver cylinder, and ergonomic grip, with the trigger and hammer clearly visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced palm swell and finger grooves for secure handling. It features a glossy black finish with a subtle red accent at the rear, likely made from a high-strength polymer or composite material. The surface appears smooth with a slight sheen, and the shape is designed to fit comfortably in the hand, enhancing control and reducing recoil. There are no visible logos or texturing patterns, giving it a clean, modern look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement and gloved use. It is thick and smoothly contoured, with no visible undercuts or squared-off edges. The design is functional and protective, ensuring the trigger is shielded from accidental contact. There are no integrated accessories or texturing on the guard.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is medium-length with a squared, vented profile along the top, likely for recoil reduction and heat dissipation. It features a rail for mounting optics or accessories and has a matte black finish. The muzzle is prominent and unthreaded, with no visible compensator or suppressor threads.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the barrel or frame in the provided images. The surfaces appear clean and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or caliber designations present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this object does not have a traditional magazine base or floorplate. The grip base is rounded and smooth, with a slight flare at the bottom for improved handling and a red accent at the rear. There are no finger rests, logos, or texturing visible on the base.
